name: AquaShield Hiking Boots
description: Premium waterproof hiking boots with anti-slip rubber sole. Features breathable Gore-Tex lining and reinforced ankle support. Ideal for trekking, mountaineering, and trail hiking in wet and rough terrain.

name: CloudWalk Running Shoes
description: Ultra-lightweight running shoes with memory foam cushioning. Breathable mesh upper keeps feet cool during long runs. Flexible sole adapts to your natural foot movement. Perfect for road running and gym workouts.

name: RainGuard Jacket Pro
description: Heavy-duty waterproof jacket with sealed seams and windproof shell. Packs into its own pocket for easy storage. Adjustable hood, reflective strips for night visibility. Ideal for hiking, cycling, and everyday rainy weather.

name: TrailBlaze Backpack 40L
description: 40-liter trekking backpack with waterproof base and rain cover. Ergonomic padded shoulder straps and hip belt for load distribution. Includes hydration bladder slot, multiple zip pockets, and external attachment points for trekking poles.

name: SunPeak Hiking Cap
description: Lightweight hiking cap with UPF 50+ UV protection. Quick-dry fabric with sweat-wicking inner band. Adjustable rear strap for perfect fit. Suitable for hiking, running, and outdoor sports.

name: NightHike Headlamp 300LM
description: Powerful 300-lumen LED headlamp with IPX6 waterproof rating. USB rechargeable with 8-hour battery life. Features adjustable beam angle, multiple brightness modes, and red light mode for night vision preservation. Essential for night hiking and camping.

name: ThermoFlask Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel bottle. Keeps drinks cold 24 hours and hot 12 hours. Leakproof lid with carry loop. Wide mouth for easy filling and cleaning. BPA-free and food-grade safe.

name: FlexFit Yoga Mat
description: Premium 6mm thick eco-friendly yoga mat with non-slip texture on both sides. Sweat-resistant surface for hot yoga. Includes carry strap. Made from natural rubber, free from harmful chemicals.

name: PowerLift Resistance Bands Set
description: Set of 5 resistance bands with different tension levels from light to extra heavy. Latex-free and skin-safe. Includes door anchor, handles, and ankle straps. Perfect for home workouts, physical therapy, and strength training.

name: CampCook Portable Stove
description: Ultra-compact backpacking stove with windproof burner. Piezo auto-ignition for one-click start. Foldable legs and pot support. Works with standard screw-top gas canisters. Boils 1 liter in under 3 minutes. Ideal for solo and group camping trips.

name: SleepEasy Sleeping Bag -5°C
description: Mummy-style sleeping bag rated to -5°C for cold weather camping. Lightweight hollow-fiber fill with water-resistant ripstop shell. Packs down small in included compression sack. Draft collar and hood drawstring for heat retention.

name: WristPulse Fitness Tracker
description: Advanced fitness tracker with continuous heart rate monitoring and SpO2 sensor. IP68 waterproof rating for swimming. Tracks steps, calories, sleep quality, and multiple sports modes. 7-day battery life. Syncs with Android and iOS.

name: QuickDry Trekking Towel
description: Microfiber trekking towel that dries 5x faster than cotton. Ultra-compact and lightweight, fits in carry pouch. Antimicrobial treatment prevents odors. Suitable for hiking, travel, beach, and gym.

name: GripTrek Trekking Poles
description: Pair of lightweight aluminum trekking poles with anti-shock spring mechanism. Adjustable from 65cm to 135cm. Comfortable cork grip with wrist strap. Folds compactly for easy transport. Interchangeable tips for different terrain.

name: CoolMesh Sports T-Shirt
description: Performance sports t-shirt with moisture-wicking polyester mesh. Quick-dry technology keeps you comfortable during intense workouts. Anti-odor treatment and flatlock seams prevent chafing. UPF 30 sun protection. Available in multiple colors.

name: MudShield Gaiters
description: Waterproof trail gaiters that keep mud, water, and debris out of your boots. Compatible with most hiking boots. Adjustable velcro closure and reinforced sole strap for secure fit. Durable ripstop fabric.

name: SolarCharge Power Bank 20000mAh
description: High-capacity solar power bank with rugged waterproof casing. 20000mAh capacity charges most smartphones 4-5 times. Dual USB output for charging two devices simultaneously. Built-in LED flashlight. Ideal for outdoor adventures and emergencies.

name: CompressLite Packing Cubes Set
description: Set of 4 compression packing cubes in multiple sizes. Double-zip compression reduces packed volume by 60%. Durable ripstop nylon with mesh top panel. Keeps clothes organized and wrinkle-free. Perfect for backpacking and travel.

name: AeroRide Cycling Helmet
description: CE certified cycling helmet with 18 ventilation channels for maximum airflow. In-mold EPS foam construction for lightweight protection. Adjustable rear dial fit system. Detachable sun visor. Suitable for road cycling, mountain biking, and commuting.

name: WildCamp Tent 2-Person
description: Lightweight 2-person backpacking tent with 3000mm waterproof rating. Freestanding double-wall design with inner mesh tent and rainfly. Sets up in under 5 minutes. Vestibule for gear storage. Packed weight 2.1kg. Ideal for 3-season camping and trekking.

name: Navigation Pro Compass
description: Professional-grade baseplate compass with glow-in-the-dark markings for night navigation. Features a built-in clinometer and magnifying glass. Waterproof and durable for extreme conditions.

name: ViewMaster 10x42 Binoculars
description: High-definition 10x42 binoculars perfect for bird watching and wildlife spotting. Nitrogen-purged for fog-proof and waterproof performance. Fully multi-coated lenses provide excellent light transmission.

name: SafetyFirst Outdoor First Aid Kit
description: Comprehensive 120-piece first aid kit designed for outdoor emergencies. Includes bandages, antiseptics, tweezers, and an emergency thermal blanket, all packed in a highly visible water-resistant case.

name: SecureLock Carabiner Set
description: Set of three heavy-duty locking carabiners rated at 25KN. Made from lightweight aircraft-grade aluminum. Snag-free keylock nose design and smooth screw gate for maximum safety.

name: Trekking Merino Wool Socks
description: Premium merino wool hiking socks designed to keep feet warm in winter and cool in summer. Features targeted cushioning to prevent blisters and moisture-wicking technology to keep feet dry.

name: OmniTool 15-in-1 Multi-tool
description: Versatile 15-in-1 multi-tool made of durable stainless steel. Features spring-action pliers, wire cutters, a sharp blade, and multiple screwdrivers. Comes with a tough nylon belt sheath.

name: Survivor 550 Paracord
description: Commercial-grade 550lb paracord with a 7-strand inner core. 100 feet in length, highly durable, and resistant to UV and mildew. Essential for tent guylines, repairs, and survival situations.

name: CloudRest Camping Hammock
description: Double camping hammock made from breathable parachute nylon. Includes heavy-duty tree straps and carabiners for quick setup. Holds up to 200kg but packs down into a small attached stuff sack.

name: AquaSeal 20L Dry Bag
description: Rugged 20L dry bag made from heavy-duty 500D PVC. Roll-top closure ensures a watertight seal, protecting gear from rain and water splashes. Floats on water, perfect for kayaking and rafting.

name: FrostGuard Winter Gloves
description: Insulated winter gloves with touchscreen-compatible fingertips. Water-resistant outer shell and windproof design keep hands warm. Anti-slip silicone palm for better grip on trekking poles or steering wheels.

name: PureDrop Personal Water Filter
description: Compact personal water filter straw that removes 99.9% of waterborne bacteria and parasites. Filters up to 1500 liters of contaminated water without iodine, chlorine, or batteries.

name: FoldAway Camping Chair
description: Ultralight collapsible camping chair with an aircraft-grade aluminum frame. Features a breathable mesh seat and a side cup holder. Packs down incredibly small into its included carry bag.

name: GeoTrack GPS Smartwatch
description: Rugged outdoor smartwatch with built-in GPS, GLONASS, and Galileo support. Features an altimeter, barometer, and 3-axis compass. Tracks heart rate and multiple outdoor sports activities.

name: FlexSupport Knee Brace
description: Adjustable knee brace providing targeted compression and support. Made from breathable, moisture-wicking neoprene. Features anti-slip silicone strips and adjustable velcro straps for a perfect fit.

name: XtremeCam 4K Action Camera
description: Capture your adventures with this 4K action camera. Includes a waterproof housing functional up to 30 meters deep. Built-in Wi-Fi for easy sharing to your smartphone. Comes with various mounting accessories.

name: PowerBoost Energy Gels
description: Box of 12 performance energy gels for endurance athletes. Formulated with complex carbohydrates, electrolytes, and amino acids for sustained energy. Includes mixed flavors with and without caffeine.

name: AeroGrip Cycling Gloves
description: Half-finger cycling gloves designed with shock-absorbing gel pads to reduce hand fatigue. Made from breathable lycra with a terry cloth thumb for wiping sweat. Easy pull-off loops for convenience.

name: ThermoBase Layer Set
description: Thermal base layer set including long-sleeve top and leggings. Soft micro-fleece lining provides exceptional warmth. Four-way stretch fabric offers full mobility while wicking away sweat.

name: IceTrekker Snow Cleats
description: Slip-on snow cleats featuring 19 stainless steel spikes for ultimate traction on ice and snow. The stretchy silicone band easily slips over most hiking boots and winter shoes. Prevents slipping in harsh conditions.

name: AlpineVision Ski Goggles
description: High-performance ski and snowboard goggles with a dual-layer spherical lens. Features advanced anti-fog technology and 100% UV protection. OTG design fits comfortably over prescription glasses.
